positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement. The central motif features intertwining luminous moon phases and stylized cosmic flora, rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and soft neon gold. The design must maintain clean, distinct silhouettes with thick, uniform lines. Emphasize a minimalist, geometric stained-glass aesthetic combined with deep space nebula textures. The composition must be perfectly balanced and highly readable as a textile print. Use dramatic, controlled volumetric lighting to ensure high contrast against a subtle, solid background. Perfect for apparel printing, suitable for screen printing.
